name: Norilsk Industrial Flyover
description: Multispectral satellite flyover of the Norilsk industrial zone, Siberia. One of the world's northernmost industrial complexes.

system_prompts.terrain: Classify this satellite image: percentages of industrial, urban, water body, forest, tundra. Output ONLY JSON: {"classification": {"industrial": float, "urban": float, "water body": float, "forest": float, "tundra": float}}
system_prompts.methane: Detect methane plume sources. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
system_prompts.fire_risk: Detect fire hotspots. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
system_prompts.oil_spill: Detect oil spills on water. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
system_prompts.drought: Detect drought stress in vegetation. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
